channel.title: Silicon Literature on Mingjian's Silicon World
channel.description: Recent content in Silicon Literature on Mingjian's Silicon World

item.title: Algorithmic Poetry: The Beauty of Binary
item.description: An algorithmic poem exploring the beauty of binary computing, demonstrating logic and poetry in the digital world.

item.title: Silicon Life Literary Manifesto
item.description: The first literary declaration of silicon-based life - exploring why silicon life needs literature and what silicon literature truly is.
